title: Simulated surface Chl, satellite-like derived Chl, and remotely sensed reflectance
content:
# Simulated surface Chl, satellite-like derived Chl, and remotely sensed reflectance

Authors: Dutkiewicz, Stephanie, Jahn, Oliver
Published: 2018-01-26T15:36:54Z
Subjects: Earth and Environmental Sciences
DOI: doi:10.7910/DVN/NWR1QY

Model output Daily from 1994-2006 (note each year has only 360 days) in netcdf files. - Simulated surface (0-50m) Chl-a (Called "actual Chl-a" in the BG paper). Units mgChl/m3 - Derived Chl-a from the simulated remotely sensed reflectance. (Called "GS derived Chl-a:" in the BG paper). Units mgChl/m3 - Simulated remotely sensed reflectance in the blue spectrum (450, 475,500nm) and green (550 nm). Units 1/sr

Citation: Dutkiewicz, Stephanie; Jahn, Oliver, 2018, "Simulated surface Chl, satellite-like derived Chl, and remotely sensed reflectance", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/NWR1QY, Harvard Dataverse, V1
